mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sprout_tag t1 WHERE t1.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY t1.tag_sort_order ASC
SELECT t1.* FROM sprout_tag t1 INNER JOIN sprout_item_tag t2 ON t1.tag_id = t2.tag_id WHERE t2.item_id = #{itemId} AND t1.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT it.item_id AS itemId , it.tag_id AS tagId FROM sprout_item_tag it INNER JOIN sprout_item i ON it.item_id = i.id WHERE i.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(tag_sort_order), 0) FROM sprout_tag WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sprout_item_tag it USING sprout_tag t WHERE it.tag_id = t.tag_id AND it.tag_id = #{tagId} AND t.user_id = #{userId}
DELETE FROM sprout_item_tag it USING sprout_item i WHERE it.item_id = i.id AND it.item_id = #{itemId} AND i.user_id = #{userId}
